mission: Team-facing operational dashboard for observability and billing.
scope_summary: Mirror provides workspace-scoped dashboards, data exports, subscription billing, and SSO for Enterprise tier. It is NOT a general-purpose BI tool and does not offer on-prem deployments.

critical_paths.name: data_export
critical_paths.description: Export of workspace data to CSV/JSON.

known_limitations: Free plan is limited to 1000 rows per dashboard. This is by design, not a bug.
SSO is only available on the Enterprise tier. Lower tiers must use email+password.
Exports larger than 100MB are queued and delivered by email — slow download is expected.

domain_glossary.workspace: Top-level tenant container; every user belongs to at least one.
domain_glossary.dashboard: Saved view of a metric query with layout settings.
domain_glossary.export: Asynchronous job that materializes a dashboard to CSV/JSON.

precedent_cases.raw_excerpt: Clicking Save in settings shows a 500 error. Page is unchanged.
precedent_cases.why: Settings save is a real failure but scoped to one area with a retry workaround.

precedent_cases.raw_excerpt: Can you please add dark mode to the dashboard? It would really help at night.
precedent_cases.why: Request for new capability, not a defect.

precedent_cases.raw_excerpt: My dashboard only shows 1000 rows even though I have 5000.
precedent_cases.why: Matches a known limitation (free plan cap). Route to support.
